FREE Full Service Delivery

Quickview

Sincere in its styling, this sofa marries classic function with modern design elements for truly transitional appeal. Its track arms lend a contemporary vibe while soft, durable upholstery ups the comfort level. And with the sofa's goes-with-anything neutral color, styling is made simple. All that’s left for you to do is to sit back and relax.

Definitely it and the great people of Ashley exceeded my expectations. The couch looks and feels amazing so comfortable and quality built!. Jackg. Sat Feb 28 2026

Gilan Sofa

By Charlton Home®

Rated 3 out of 5 stars. 1 total vote

Fresh yet classic. That’s the beauty of this sofa. Dressy and also soft to the touch, its organic neutral-toned upholstery is sure to bring a transitional farmhouse aesthetic to your living space. Accent pillows in windowpane plaid and textured solid hues infuse a cozy and inviting farmhouse sensibility, while a full wraparound base and decorative turned legs complete the sofa's timeless look. It's the perfect place to unwind with your besties after a long day.

The style and color were just what I wanted but the quality isn’t what I expected. As I have lived with it for a little over a month I’ve discovered that the back pillows are not equally filled, the front piece was not fully tucked into the bottom frame piece, and the front piece of one the arms is not fully filled and is puckered. I was able to remedy all but the arm, which I’ll have live with.. Gregorys. Sun Nov 16 2025

This striking mid-century modern recliner combines comfort and modernity and is sure to add style to your living room. It is supported by four tapered wooden legs with non-slip feet on the bottom. The clean-lined frame is made of solid and engineered wood and covered in neutral-toned corduroy upholstery. The pillow backrest increases its softness and is filled with high-quality sponge to keep the backrest full and elastic. This recliner's high-density foam cushions provide the ultimate comfort that lasts. The ottoman is equally elegant in its own right with its square armrests, button-down seat cushion, and attached bolster pillow. Trust this sofa to experience the ultimate in comfort and style, getting maximum plumpness for a cloud-like feel.

We love this piece. It fits our room perfectly and the color goes with the walls and flooring. Assembly was straight forward and fast. It is also  very comfortable. Great value for the money.. James. Murray, UT. Thu Feb 26 2026

$429.99 was $1,077.00

Bring rustic elegance to your home with this farmhouse-style sofa, designed to offer both comfort and style. Featuring generously wide rolled arms, the sofa provides a welcoming and cozy seating area, suitable for relaxing or entertaining guests. The front of the arms is adorned with solid wood detailing, enhancing its vintage-inspired design. This sofa stands on sturdy wooden gourd-shaped legs, which lend an earthy, natural feel, while the base is accented with nailhead trims, adding a touch of sophistication and texture. Upholstered in durable fabric, it is a versatile addition to any farmhouse or rustic-themed home. The textured fabric offers visual interest and feels soft to the touch, ensuring a comfortable seating experience. Whether you’re enjoying a quiet evening or hosting family gatherings, this farmhouse-style sofa provides the perfect setting to unwind.

I feel so tickled and pleased with my lovely summer breeze couches every time I lay eyes on them, and feel so lucky to have gotten them at this terrific sales price.  They were a breeze to put together (for a 70 year old woman) and are so comfortable that I would not hesitate to offer them as a place to sleep for an overnight guest.  I had worried they’d may look/feel flimsy and cheap, but the quality is brilliant and I absolutely, positively, totally love them.. Elisabeth. Santa Barbara. Mon Mar 02 2026

Rated 4.5 out of 5 stars. 156 total votes

Introducing our latest addition, the three-seater sofa, a perfect blend of style and comfort. Crafted with a sturdy wood frame, this oversized sofa is designed to provide you with the ultimate lounging experience. Wrapped in soft corduroy upholstery, this sofa features a neutral hue that effortlessly complements most design schemes. Its deep seating and clean silhouette, along with clean and neat square armrests, add a touch of sophistication to any space. What sets this sofa apart is its innovative design. The center seat cushion has been eliminated, allowing for elongated plushness and deep seating. The metal back structure support ensures durability and stability, making it ideal for cozy movie nights with a modern touch. Not only does this sofa boast a solid neutral color that easily blends in with any decor, but its cushions are also filled with foam and supported by coil springs. This ensures that the sofa resists sagging over time, maintaining its shape and comfort for years to come. Cleaning is a breeze with this upholstered sofa, making it a practical choice for busy households. Additionally, it comes with two extra toss pillows, adding texture and enhancing the overall aesthetic of your living space. Upgrade your lounging experience with our three-seater sofa. Its square arms, oversized design, and plush cushions create a luxurious. Don't miss out on the perfect combination of style, comfort, and durability.
